gpt55_review_summary: GPT-5.5 initially blocked because the matrix asserted benchmark/storage evidence without tracked artifact traceability and slightly overstated the storage gate. After adding pr-evidence/document-vllm-prepared-evidence/README.md with artifact paths/SHA-256s and candidate-scoped wording, re-review approved with no findings.
verification: GPT-5.5 review initially blocked traceability/wording; re-review approved after adding artifact fingerprints and candidate-scoped release-gate language.
what_changed: Recorded candidate target g6/L4 prepared vLLM smoke evidence and its strict cache-release gap in the V1 requirements matrix.
Added a tracked evidence README with run IDs, UC artifact roots, local artifact-copy paths, and SHA-256 fingerprints for the prepared vLLM smoke and UC storage benchmark artifacts.
why: The latest Databricks run validates the plain vLLM OpenAI-compatible path and storage benchmark, but strict release evidence still requires runtime-suffix KV-aware cache measurements plus native vLLM/SGLang probe/action/launch artifacts.
